about the brahma viharas and uh from here you get an idea how the exact definition of those pali words karuna modita and opaque because here is mentioned the opposite like when you practice meta and you develop meter it is not possible for ill will to stay for you will to arise because ill will is the opposite of meta so meta can be translated as good will and the second 1 is ruthless and fierce thoughts cannot arise if you develop compassion and compassion karuna is the opposite of ruthless and fierce thoughts and the third 1 sometimes people translate as sympathetic joy if you practice mudita it is not possible for aversion to arise because when there's a lot of joy in you they cannot arise abortion so the mudita means join and the fourth 1 you develop passion cannot arise because nemita no object in the mind then the thoughts cannot run after science and the last 1 is interesting because if a man were to develop his his mind until it's so tranquil that the thought or the feeling that i am which is always present in us and normally uh does not arise and he does not perceive within himself that he is this or that then doubts about the path and cannot arise this last 1 concerns the fourth method of meditation mentioned by venable ananda in the previous suta for nikaya 4.170 where it was mentioned by venerable ananda that when the monks and nuns attain arahanth and they come and declare to him that they had attained hood by 1 of 4 ways the first 1 is they develop samatha first followed by vipassana the second 1 is vipassana first followed by samatha the third 1 is samatha and vipasana at the same time and the fourth 1 is the [Music] meditate on the self which is the i am the thought the feeling of i am which is inbuilt in every 1 of us the source of the and if we meditate and put our mind on that the feeling of i am the mind becomes more and more tranquil because as long as we are focused on the feeling or the thought i am the thoughts do not arise like other thoughts do not arise so we go deeper and deeper into our mind and if the mind comes so still that the i am dissolves there is no more ego i felt like then the way is sure and there is no more
